description_long: This object is a low-poly, stylized handbag with a rectangular base and two prominent straps arching over the top. The body and straps are rendered in a muted pink color, giving it a soft, modern appearance. The straps are wide and appear to be fixed at both ends to the sides of the bag, suggesting a sturdy construction. The bag lacks any visible closure mechanism, decorative elements, or branding, emphasizing a minimalist design. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, with hard, angular edges typical of a simplified digital model. Its size and proportions suggest it is suitable for carrying by hand or possibly over the forearm.
description: A minimalist, pink handbag with two wide, fixed straps and a rectangular base, featuring a matte, unadorned surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wide straps arching over the opening and the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the straps and the flat, elongated body of the bag.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both straps visible and the open top apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the strap profile and the bag's flat, rectangular shape.
attribute_strap_type: Two wide, fixed short handles attached at both ends to the sides of the bag; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None visible; the top appears open without any closure.
